subject: docs(implementations): backport ~70 field improvements from cross-repo audit
body:
Audited all 12 active devmade-ai repos for pattern implementation status.
Identified and backported innovations from field implementations into all 7
reference pattern docs — APP_ICONS, BURGER_MENU, DEBUG_SYSTEM, DOWNLOAD_PDF,
HTTPS_PROXY, PWA_SYSTEM, and THEME_DARK_MODE.

Major additions: extracted focus hooks, keyboard navigation, expanded browser
detection (7 Chromium browsers), module-level singleton for PWA state,
pre-React inline debug pill, console interception, generateReport in module,
fetchWithRetry with rate-limit handling, oklch→hex build script, Zustand store
pattern, and custom SW section for non-Vite projects.

Tags: documentation, audit, implementations, cross-repo
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TWRtgwM2KfYuNoaMzR7r4V
